positioning: S9 Return to Source is part of the 1320 Soul Origin Code System™, a symbolic self-reflection architecture. It is designed to help users reflect on 回源之门 as a non-deterministic awareness and integration layer. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or fortune-telling.

calculation_dependency.zero_handling: Keep 0 as a valid code. Do not convert 0 unless a future product rule explicitly says otherwise.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source happens through silence, stillness, and the space before identity forms.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning that wholeness can be felt without explanation, performance, or conclusion.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person stops demanding constant meaning and allows quiet presence to become enough.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become withdrawal, dissociation, or avoiding life in the name of peace.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as silence that makes the person more present, not less engaged.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Source is not far away. It is the quiet that remains when you stop leaving yourself.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source is through remembering that existence does not need to be proven.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul releasing the belief that value must be earned through achievement, beauty, usefulness, or recognition.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person acts from worth rather than for worth.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become complacency or avoiding growth by calling everything already complete.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as enoughness that still allows honest growth.
entries.wisewave_reflection: You were not created as a question mark. You are allowed to live from enough.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source happens through loosening control and learning to cooperate with life without becoming passive.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul releasing the need to manage every outcome in order to feel safe.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person distinguishes trust from avoidance and responsibility from control.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become passivity, magical thinking, or refusing practical responsibility.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as grounded trust: doing the next true thing while allowing life to remain alive.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Trust is not the absence of action. It is action without the grip of fear.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source is through remembering that separateness is not the whole truth.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul healing isolation, guardedness, and the belief that they must carry everything alone.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when connection becomes chosen, discerning, and rooted in self-presence.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become merging, dependency, or looking to others as the source of self.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as connection without self-abandonment.
entries.wisewave_reflection: You return to source not by disappearing into others, but by meeting life with an open center.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source happens through allowing truth to refine identity, hope, relationships, and direction.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning that reality is not an enemy of love; it is the ground where love becomes real.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person stops protecting illusions and lets honest seeing become liberation.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become harshness, judgment, or using truth to defend against tenderness.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as truth with compassion: clear enough to liberate, gentle enough to be received.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Truth does not remove love. It removes what love was never meant to carry.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source is through releasing the identity that must force, fix, or explain everything.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning that some thresholds open through softening, not pressure.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when effort becomes clean and the person stops using striving to avoid vulnerability.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become collapse, resignation, or spiritual bypassing.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as surrendered participation: fully present, but no longer fighting the shape of reality.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Surrender is not giving up. It is no longer fighting what must be met.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source happens through releasing the weight of blame, guilt, and unfinished emotional contracts.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning that forgiveness is not approval; it is the return of life-force to the self.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person stops making pain the center of identity and begins reclaiming freedom.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become premature forgiveness, denying anger, or remaining in harmful patterns to appear evolved.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as forgiveness with truth, boundaries, and self-respect.
entries.wisewave_reflection: Forgiveness does not ask you to forget yourself. It asks you to stop imprisoning your life in the past.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source is through entering the present moment fully enough for life to touch you again.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning to come back from future fear, past loops, and imagined versions of reality.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person chooses direct experience over constant mental departure.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become passivity, avoidance of planning, or using presence to ignore real responsibilities.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as presence that sharpens action rather than dulling it.
entries.wisewave_reflection: The present moment is not small. It is the only place your soul can actually return.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

entries.return_essence: Your return to source happens through integrating the parts of yourself you once split into good, bad, spiritual, human, strong, or weak.
entries.what_your_soul_remembers: This code reflects a soul learning that wholeness is not perfection; it is honest inclusion.
entries.how_life_themes_resolve: Life themes resolve when the person stops rejecting pieces of their humanity in order to feel worthy of source.
entries.shadow_distortion_of_return: When distorted, return may become identity inflation, trying to appear integrated, or bypassing the ordinary human process.
entries.mature_return_expression: Mature return appears as simple wholeness: nothing exaggerated, nothing denied.
entries.wisewave_reflection: You return to source by becoming less divided from yourself.
entries.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.

safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, or a statement of fixed identity.
